text:
EVANGELION Millennials 2 is a mook published by Poplar Sha on 01 September 2020. https://www.amazon.co.jp/-/en/dp/4591167178 

Overview

It is a mook published in preparation to the release of Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is a catalog in of various clothing itens made by RADIO EVA. Several illustrations feature Shinji Ikari, Asuka Shikinami Langley, Kaworu Nagisa, Rei Ayanami and Mari Makinami Illustrious as models using the products sold by the brand. The cover was illustrated by Mai Yoneyama. It also comes with a RADIO EVA collaboration original T-shirt. https://www.eva-info.jp/9716
